title: chiococca oaxacana
intro: Chiococca oaxacana, also known as Oaxaca vine or Mexican gentian, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chiococca oaxacana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water, and it can also be used in capsule or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
